name: itu-giga-kp
description: Production kit for the FiscalAdmin OU — ITU/Giga Knowledge Products contract (RFQ-S-GIGA-2026-022, PO #334304). KP1 (plan): author a KP video-script bundle in the locked audience register, verify every PAERA citation, run the ITU compliance gate, build/render the docx. KP2–4 (build): scaffold a runnable build pack, generate Building-Block configuration from public specs (X-Road / GovStack / Joget), and verify the solution actually runs on the Linkup + Joget stack. One author skill plus mechanic and gate skills, modelled on the RA-to-RFP kit.
